descriptionShort: Red Deer Rustlers lose 9-1 to Richmond Sockeyes in game seven of Centennial Cup tier two semifinal.
descriptionLong: The Richmond Sockeyes defeated the Red Deer Rustlers 9-1 in the seventh and deciding game of the western Centennial Cup tier two junior hockey semifinal series on April 17, 1987. Red Deer, exhausted after 27 playoff games in 47 days, could not match Richmond's size and talent. The Sockeyes scored five unanswered goals in the second period to blow open a scoreless game, with Pete deGraaf scoring Red Deer's lone third-period goal.

attribution.headline: Red Deer Rustlers Fall to Richmond Sockeyes in Centennial Cup Semifinal
